creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that I set an expiration date two-and-a-half months from now; going
for a full half year felt a little much.

Also note that I did bump PORTREVISION to make sure users are notified.


Would you like to see the similar change for lang/gcc47?

As Mark and me explained, lang/gcc48 and lang/gcc49 are still necessary,
though marking them as DEPRECATED without an EXPIRATION_DATE is something
we can do. 

Perhaps I should ask: What is your motivation to see those changes?
Understanding that may help guide (additional) appropriate steps...
